title: Unify RCA behavior across all feedback-backed evaluation paths
description:
## Summary
Apply one RCA contract across all feedback-backed evaluation paths.

## Deliverables
- Use the same RCA behavior in `FeedbackEvaluation` and the accuracy-with-feedback-dataset path.
- Remove split-brain behavior between the two code paths.
- Keep one correct RCA implementation path rather than parallel variants.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation: align accuracy-with-feedback path to the same RCA contract/shape used by FeedbackEvaluation and remove remaining split behavior in persistence/completion semantics.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented contract unification: both FeedbackEvaluation.run and accuracy-with-feedback path now use shared FeedbackEvaluation RCA contract helpers (root_cause_contract_outcome + apply_root_cause_contract_to_parameters). This removes duplicate/split RCA completion logic.
